techs.name: Efficient Woodcutting
techs.description: Gathering wood yields one extra wood.

techs.name: Improved Construction
techs.description: Houses cost half as much wood.

techs.name: Advanced Mining
techs.description: Increases stone and iron gathering efficiency and yields.

techs.name: Agricultural Techniques
techs.description: Improves food production and crop yields.

techs.name: Basic Medicine
techs.description: Increases population health and lifespan.

techs.name: Metal Tools
techs.description: Workers are more efficient at all tasks.

techs.name: Dense Housing
techs.description: Houses can accommodate more people.

techs.name: Improved Logistics
techs.description: Resources are shared more efficiently between colonies.

techs.name: Field Backpacks
techs.description: Adds two inventory slots for carried food and supplies.

techs.name: Rationing Practices
techs.description: Carried food restores hunger more efficiently.

techs.name: Education System
techs.description: Increases intelligence of new births.

techs.name: Physical Training
techs.description: Increases strength of new births.

techs.name: Exploration Techniques
techs.description: People move faster and discover resources more efficiently.

techs.name: Population Management
techs.description: Increases birth rates in suitable conditions.

techs.name: Stone Masonry
techs.description: Enables building with stone for more durable structures.

techs.name: Trade Charters
techs.description: Turns surplus gold into demographic and morale momentum.

techs.name: Weapon Smithing
techs.description: Improves weapon quality for stronger attacks.

techs.name: Armor Smithing
techs.description: Improves defensive gear and battlefield survivability.

techs.name: Military Training
techs.description: Formal drills unlock dedicated warrior discipline.

techs.name: War Drums
techs.description: Coordinated battle signals improve combat morale.

techs.name: Recon Scouts
techs.description: Forward scouting expands battlefield awareness.

techs.name: Advanced Tactics
techs.description: Codified maneuvers unlock formation-level command.

techs.name: Fortification Doctrine
techs.description: Unlocks colony fortification construction plans.

techs.name: Advanced Fortification
techs.description: Reinforcement methods increase fortification durability.

techs.name: Siege Craft
techs.description: Specialized siege knowledge improves structure assault power.
